queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-reducing influence of critical or diversified existing credit accounts on borrower default probability.
